reviews.review_title: classic books loading with white covers
reviews.review_description: this app seems great but I'm having  trouble where all of the classic books are loading with white covers and the pages won't turn. I'm trying to contact the developers. if you see this, can you email me? or contact me? I've been looking for an app like this forever!

but they were dashed. It is amazing that something so simple went so wrong. Especially when more complex programs work perfectly. An ebook reader is a necessary addition to this technology, but this on is NOT it. Don't waste your time.

I tried to do the import that another reviewer mentioned, no luck.  It sat there for 5 minutes trying to load in my epub file.  Also, controls aren't intuitive.  It's sad, because this could really be something.
How do the ai generated stories work? I select a prompt and genre and press submit and it says it will appear in my library in a few minutes, but it never does.

reviews.review_title: AI and importing stories aren't working
reviews.review_description: Can someone tell me how to import my own books to use?

reviews.review_title: Amazing! Always wanted to read in AR
reviews.review_description: I been waiting for an reading application like this for years! I always wanted to try reading in AR, and the quality is perfect. I also love the custom story creation feature, where I was able to create custom Anime with my children and read it through the application. Great job on here!

reviews.review_title: Unable to import epubs and pdf files
reviews.review_description: I don't see any clear options or instructions by the creator on how to import books I did what another reviewer did and put the epub into the data folder of the xr application. I shouldnt have to do this to add books to the quest. The app in its current state is barely usable as a feature advertised isnt working.

To import an ePub file you must Connect glasses to pc by USB port. Then glasses appears as a memory USB in pc. You must copy your ePub file in android/data/xrReader. The file will appear in xr import menu. Press to import
